pour_steps: 60g bloom w/ swirl; vigorous spiral to 300g (0:45-1:15); gentle center pour to 500g (1:15-1:45)
Competition: 50/70/60/60/60. Simplified: 60g x5. Each when bed runs dry.
500g ice on bed + 100g cold water — slow melt 4-15 hours
60g bloom + aggressive spin; pour to 200g + gentle spin (at 40s); pour to 330g + gentle spin (when 70% drained)
agitation: Spin after each pour (aggressive on bloom; gentle on pours)

pour_steps: 60g x5 — next when bed nearly dry. Dual-kettle: 93°C bloom then ~88°C later pours.

50g at 0:00 + swirl; 50g at 0:30 + swirl; 120g at 1:00 + swirl; 120g at 1:30 + swirl
60g bloom (wait 1 min); 90g pour (at 1:00); 90g pour (at 1:45). Stir 60g ice into brew.

60g bloom + stir (30s); pour to 200g; continue to 500g in circular motions
